idea-plugin.name: AgentHub
idea-plugin.description:
AgentHub adds a toolbar button to every JetBrains IDE that launches any popular CLI coding agent in its own terminal window — one click, no setup. Works with IntelliJ IDEA, PhpStorm, WebStorm, PyCharm, GoLand, Rider and the rest.

Highlights

  • 30+ built-in agents — Claude Code (Anthropic), Codex CLI (OpenAI), Grok Build (xAI), Antigravity CLI (Google), Copilot CLI (GitHub), Cursor, Aider, Qodo, Qwen Code, Goose, OpenCode and many more.
  • One-click launch from the toolbar — or install a missing agent through a confirmation dialog.
  • Auto-detection of installed agents on startup.
  • Update notifications — a background check flags agents that have a newer version.
  • Manage from Settings — install, update or remove any agent.
  • Custom agent — add your own CLI tool with a name, command and URL.
  • Companion tools — optional CLI utilities that work alongside the agents (usage tracking, context packing, skills); off by default.
  • Cross-platform — macOS, Linux and Windows (PowerShell helper script).

Open Settings/Preferences → Tools → AgentHub to choose which agents appear in the toolbar dropdown and to configure your custom agent.

Supported agents

  • Aider — Aider AI
  • Amp — Sourcegraph
  • Antigravity CLI — Google
  • Auggie — Augment
  • Claude Code — Anthropic
  • Cline — Cline
  • CodeBuddy — Tencent
  • Codex CLI — OpenAI
  • Cody CLI — Sourcegraph
  • Command Code — Command Code
  • Continue CLI — Continue
  • Copilot CLI — GitHub
  • Crush — Charm
  • Cursor CLI — Cursor
  • Devin — Cognition
  • Droid — Factory AI
  • ForgeCode — Antinomy
  • Freebuff — Codebuff
  • Goose CLI — Block
  • Grok Build — xAI
  • iFlow CLI — iFlow
  • Junie CLI — JetBrains
  • Kilo Code — Kilo
  • Kimi Code — Moonshot AI
  • Kiro CLI — Kiro
  • Kode — shareAI-lab
  • LeanCTL — LeanCTL
  • MiMo Code — Xiaomi
  • Mistral Vibe — Mistral AI
  • OpenClaw — OpenClaw
  • OpenCode — SST
  • OpenHands — All Hands
  • Plandex — Plandex
  • Qodo — Qodo
  • Qoder CLI — Qoder AI
  • Qwen Code — Alibaba
  • SWE-agent — SWE-agent
  • VT Code — vinhnx

Command Code, ForgeCode, LeanCTL and Plandex are hidden on Windows (no native Windows build, or a launch command that collides with a built-in Windows command).

Companion tools — optional CLI utilities that work alongside the agents (off by default):

  • ccusage — token & cost usage reports from local agent logs
  • Repomix — pack your repository into an AI-friendly file
  • Skills — install reusable agent skills
  • TokenTracker — local token & cost dashboard
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0 — first stable release

  • New Companion Tools section — optional CLI utilities that work alongside the agents: ccusage, Repomix, Skills and TokenTracker (off by default; enable in Settings)
  • New agents: CodeBuddy (Tencent), Command Code, Devin (Cognition), iFlow CLI, Junie CLI (JetBrains), Kode and OpenClaw

0.9.1

  • New agent: Freebuff (Codebuff) — the free, ad-supported terminal coding agent
  • Fixes: Toolbar install of a not-installed agent now honors the "Run operations in background" setting; a background-installed agent launches automatically once ready
  • Lowered minimum platform to JetBrains IDE 2024.1+ (build 241+)

0.9.0 — Initial release

  • 30 built-in CLI coding agents
  • One-click launch from toolbar; not-installed agents prompt to install with confirmation
  • Auto-detect on first install and after each plugin update
  • Background update availability check on IDE startup
  • Install / Update / Remove directly from Settings panel
  • Custom agent support: configure your own CLI tool with name, command and URL
  • Cross-platform: macOS, Linux, Windows (PowerShell helper script)

group.description: Launch CLI coding agents in an IDE terminal. Auto-detects installed agents.
